title: Short Channel IDs
description: A Short Channel ID compactly identifies a Lightning channel's funding output by encoding its block height, transaction index, and output index. It lets gossip messages refer to the same on-chain channel without repeating the full transaction outpoint.

resources.title: BOLT 07: Short Channel ID
resources.notes: Canonical encoding and use of the identifier in Lightning gossip.

resources.title: BOLT 03: Funding Transaction Output
resources.notes: Connects the identifier to the on-chain funding output that creates a channel.

resources.title: Mastering the Lightning Network
resources.notes: Technical background for channel identifiers, gossip, and Lightning routing.
